detail: Question class witnesses falsifiers and maximum conclusion were committed before derivation.
All components of nabla P were solved for the general cross jets in an adapted orthonormal frame.
Both pure-trace conditions and the unique one-form were derived and substituted back.
A nonintegrable rank-two plane is ruled out by torsion and Frobenius.
Each constant metric uses its own metric-orthogonal projector rather than a coordinate projector.
Nonzero round curvature and unrestricted intrinsic screen connection are retained.
Representative shift leaves the affine connection unchanged.
Residual base boost and angular rotation are explicit; global holonomy is not computed.
Zeros degeneracies cover gluing caps and boundary continuation remain open.
Torsionful and non-Weyl nonmetric connections are not tested.
No field equation action boundary functional evolution or bootstrap selection is used.
No carrier Hopf section soliton source mass or topology is selected.
Exact SymPy derivation and independent standard-library rational reconstruction; no GPU.
